name: COGNEX CORP
summary: Cognex Corporation, founded in 1981, is a global technology leader in industrial machine vision systems. The company provides hardware and software solutions that capture and analyze visual information to automate manufacturing and distribution tasks. Products include barcode readers, AI-enabled vision technology, 3D vision systems, and deep learning vision software, serving industries such as logistics, packaging, consumer electronics, automotive, and semiconductor.

products.name: Barcode Readers
products.description: High-performance barcode reading solutions used primarily in logistics and traceability applications.

products.name: AI-Enabled Vision Technology
products.description: Artificial intelligence vision tools for industrial inspection, detection, and automation applications.

products.name: 3D Vision Systems
products.description: Three-dimensional vision solutions for measurement, robotic guidance, and inspection in manufacturing.

products.name: Deep Learning Vision Software
products.description: Software designed to solve complex vision applications with unpredictable defects and deviations.

products.name: Edge Learning Products
products.description: Machine vision tools enabling customers with less technical capability to deploy vision applications more easily.

products.name: Solutions Experience (SLX) Devices
products.description: Logistics-sector devices integrating AI vision with intuitive deployment workflows, launched in 2025.

partnerships.description: OEMs deploy Cognex machine vision solutions directly or as part of integrated systems for customers.
Machine builders incorporate Cognex vision technology into automated manufacturing equipment.
System integrators deploy Cognex solutions for logistics and manufacturing automation customers.
